directions_tried.name: Phase 1: Parallel proof tournament + large-lattice verification
directions_tried.outcome: All confirm H_norm ≤ 1/12 (zero counterexamples, L=4). Proof reduces to R(Q) ≼ 0 (Weitzenböck). B_P proof chain broken. Key structure: F(Q) = 4d iff pure gauge. Fourier theorem K_curl = 4dI-4J proved analytically.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2: Weitzenböck R(Q) sign + full operator verification + pure gauge characterization
directions_tried.outcome: CRITICAL: Full M(Q) ≼ M(I) is FALSE (Tr(R(Q))=0 forces half positive/negative). Correct target: P^T R(Q) P ≼ 0 (9×9 top eigenspace projection). Confirmed 42+ configs, gradient ascent -8 to -11. Pure gauge isometry proved. Tr(M(Q))=Tr(M(I)) structural invariant found.

directions_tried.name: Phase 3: Analytical proof attempt + adversarial review + final synthesis
directions_tried.outcome: E010 produced FINAL-REPORT.md with complete synthesis. Rigorous result: H_norm ≤ 1/8, β < 1/6 (8× SZZ). Conjectured: H_norm ≤ 1/12, β < 1/4 (12× SZZ). Obstruction atlas documented. Novel claims registered.

explorations_completed.key_finding: M₁|_P = 0 proved (Q=I critical point). Proved for uniform Q. Identified Jiang (2022) Weitzenböck M(Q)=M(I)+R(Q).
Proved F'(0)=0. KEY: F=4d iff pure gauge. Geodesic concavity fails globally.
Proved for flat connections and perturbative. cos(ε) suppression mechanism.
K_curl λ_max=4d ANALYTICALLY PROVED. H_norm≤1/12 confirmed L=4 (50+ configs). B_P chain BROKEN.
CRITICAL: Full operator M(Q) ≼ M(I) is FALSE. Correct target: λ_max(M(Q)) ≤ 4d. Jiang arXiv:2211.17195 found.
PROVED: Tr(M(Q))=Tr(M(I)) for all Q. PROVED: M(Q_pure)=Ad_G^T M(I) Ad_G. P^T R(Q) P ≼ 0 for 42 configs.
Δ=14(cosε-1)≤0 for single-link (analytical). B_□ B_□^T=4I₃ per plaquette invariant. E[M(Q)]=6I.
